summary: Comprehensive testing of BarberHub application completed. Backend APIs working excellently (100% success rate). Frontend core features working well including landing page, authentication, dashboard, and public booking. Session management needs improvement.

integration_issues.issue: User sessions expire quickly, causing frequent redirects to login page when navigating between protected routes

passed_tests: Landing page shows BarberHub name correctly
Landing page shows pricing section with both plans (R$ 49,90 and R$ 99,90)
Login page works with test credentials (teste@demo.com / 123456)
Registration creates user with barbershop and 7-day trial
Dashboard displays plan status and statistics correctly
Public booking page loads at /b/{slug} with services
Settings page has color customization functionality
Settings page shows QR Code section
Backend API health check (100% success rate)
action_item_for_main_agent: Main issue: Frontend session management needs improvement to prevent frequent session expiration. Users get redirected to login when navigating between protected routes. This affects user experience significantly. All backend APIs are working perfectly.
